title: Reforged Mobs
description: Texture pack which freshens up the look of particularly aged hostile mobs.
body:
![Reforged Mobs title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5cfb6011425069170ccf5d12485e58f8cac8de3.png)
## About
As Mojang has been slowly remastering the default textures of the game, they seem to have left some stragglers behind, **Reforged Mobs** aims to fix that. By giving mobs with ancient textures a new look which builds upon their pre-existing ones, sometimes rethemeing textures fully like with the Guardian and Elder Guardian or giving a mob a "remaster" of sorts, like with the Ghast. I've put particular care into making the textures fit with the vanilla game while bringing consistency to the game.

 

**No Optifine or EMF required, this mod doesn't change any models.**

 

## Features

 

The resource pack currently features new textures for:

- Ghast
- Witch
- Enderman
- Creeper
- Blaze
- Shulker
- Guardian (and Elder Guardian)
Other planned mobs are the Silverfish and Endermite.
 

The pack is likely not compatible with any animation or model changing packs like Fresh Animations.
![Witch, Creeper, Enderman, Shulker and Guardian textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bd707c517faf1efa76814c0ddd9119d34444904.png)

### Credits
